compiled_state.title: RED test: evaluator agent blast-radius integration
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Append 5 new test functions to `tests/skills/test_complexity_evaluator_agent.py`:
1. `test_blast_radius_heading` — body contains "Blast Radius" as a dimension heading
2. `test_blast_radius_references_script` — body contains "blast-radius-score.py"
3. `test_blast_radius_complex_forcing` — body contains rule linking complex_override=true to COMPLEX
4. `test_blast_radius_is_sixth_dimension` — body mentions "Dimension 6" or equivalent
5. `test_blast_radius_procedure_step` — procedure section between "Find Files" and "Apply Rubric" contains step invoking blast-radius-score.py with stdin pipe notation

TDD: RED — evaluator doesn't yet contain blast-radius content.

### .test-index entry
`plugins/dso/agents/complexity-evaluator.md: tests/skills/test_complexity_evaluator_agent.py [test_blast_radius_heading]`

### File Impact
- Edit: `tests/skills/test_complexity_evaluator_agent.py`
- Edit: `.test-index`

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] 5 new blast-radius tests
  Verify: grep -c "def test_blast" tests/skills/test_complexity_evaluator_agent.py | awk '{exit ($1 < 5)}'
- [ ] Syntactically valid Python
  Verify: python3 -m py_compile tests/skills/test_complexity_evaluator_agent.py
- [ ] New tests fail as expected (RED)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && python3 -m pytest tests/skills/test_complexity_evaluator_agent.py -k test_blast_radius --tb=no -q 2>&1 | grep -c FAILED | awk '{exit ($1 < 5)}'
- [ ] .test-index RED marker
  Verify: grep -q 'complexity-evaluator.md.*test_complexity_evaluator_agent.py.*\[test_blast_radius_heading\]' .test-index
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Gap Analysis Amendment

Consider adding a 6th test for graceful degradation text:
- `test_blast_radius_graceful_degradation` — body contains degradation instruction (skip/absent/non-zero) near the blast-radius procedure step

This is a minor gap (content-presence test for instructions the LLM agent follows). Add if the test list allows a 6th function; the 5 specified tests are the priority.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
I don't see a TICKET section in your message - it appears to be empty. Without knowing what changes are being requested, I cannot accurately determine which files would be modified.

Please provide the ticket details (description, requirements, or changes needed) so I can identify the relevant source and test files that would need to be modified.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: All ACs verified ✓ — AC1: 5 blast-radius functions found; AC2: syntax valid; AC3: all 5 fail RED; AC4: .test-index marker present
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — 5 RED blast-radius tests appended to test_complexity_evaluator_agent.py; .test-index marker added; all 4 ACs verified
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
